Notes: Start with no replay.campus.edu. TXT RRset present. Replaying the same syntactically valid delete_rrset against an already-absent RRset may be accepted as an idempotent no-op or rejected as NXRRSET; follow-up query confirms the RRset remains absent either way.

Steps.Description: Delete the absent TXT RRset at replay.campus.edu. with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: replay.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the TXT RRset remains absent after the update.
